allow: Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('python/inference.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('ok'\)")
Bash(python -c "import torch, tiktoken; print\('torch', torch.__version__, 'cuda', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\('tiktoken', tiktoken.__version__\)")
Bash(node bin/zeroshot-run.js bench ckpt_mid --tokens 32 --prompt "The quick brown fox")
Bash(python python/inference.py --checkpoint ckpt_mid_final.pt --prompt "The quick brown fox" --max_tokens 16 --temperature 0.8 --fp16)
Bash(python -u python/inference.py --checkpoint ckpt_mid_final.pt --prompt "The quick brown fox" --max_tokens 16 --temperature 0.8 --fp16)
Bash(node bin/zeroshot-run.js bench ckpt_mid --tokens 128 --prompt "Once upon a time,")
